creator: dpolyg@gmail.com
text:
Hi Chris,

actually I just discovered portlint and the fact that it is not happy at all with my changes... The code is working, but seems like there are some Makefile formatting issues. So please feel free to ignore this patch or use it as the hint for yours. I will make new one, check it with portlint more carefully and place it here.

Regards,
Denis.
